steps.title: Follow the bleaching sequence
steps.content: The text gives a cause-and-effect chain: environmental stress can kill or expel algae, which makes corals appear white. To recover algae, bleached corals produce bright colors that block intense sunlight.

steps.title: Reject claims about recovery
steps.content: B compares vulnerability to white corals without support. C says recovery happens without algae, but the colors encourage algae to return. D claims bright corals survive better without algae, which the text never says. The answer is A.
